initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    store.s_store_name, 
    date_dim.d_year, 
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales, 
    SUM(store_sales.ss_net_profit) AS net_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    store.s_store_name = 'ese'
GROUP BY 
    store.s_store_name, 
    date_dim.d_year
LIMIT 100;
